generated_by: hand-authored (Search v3 S0 baseline refreshed post-S8, 2026-07-21)
notes: Static synthetic content that mirrors the SHIPPED /api/search + /api/search/compare shapes (post-S4b / S5 / S8).
Schema-v1 predated the S4/S5 landing (RFC-107 planned enriched.answer + operator_result.clusters); v2 matches what the code actually returns.
The build-script --search-slice mode captures these same shapes from a real corpus + running API when the operator regenerates locally (see README.md).
Anchored to episode_ids present in the parent fixture's manifest.json so hit-card handoffs to Library / Graph resolve cleanly.

Shape contract sources: RFC-107 §2 (SearchResponse), RFC-072 §6 (lifted compound), RFC-088 chunk 5 (per-hit metadata.query_enrichments.related_topics), ADR-108 (consensus_pairs), RFC-093 (build_briefing_pack for compare), server/schemas.py (CorpusSearchApiResponse / SearchCompareResponse).

anchor_feeds.note: 5 episodes on this feed — used for Cluster (theme members), Consensus (cross-speaker pairs), and Compare (2 subjects) scenarios

compound-lift.description: Transcript hit that lifts to a linked GI Insight (RFC-072 KL1 shipped). WorkspaceResults renders this as a CompoundCard with a '+ insight' badge (UXS-016 §Results).

results.text: The question of who governs compute — the actual silicon and the datacenters that host it — is being answered right now, not by regulators.

enriched-answer.description: Enriched-answer hero (Search v3 §S5). Shipped shape: NO top-level enriched.answer text — the QueryEnricher chain (RFC-088 chunk 5) decorates each hit's ``metadata.query_enrichments.related_topics[]`` with topic_id / topic_label / similarity. The client's EnrichedAnswerHero aggregates decorated hits into a ranked chip list; there is no synthesized answer surface yet (deferred to a later chunk of RFC-088). Server flag: ?enrich_results=true.

operator-cluster.description: Result-set operator Cluster (RFC-107 §6.1, Search v3 §S4b). Shipped shape: top-level ``operator: 'cluster'`` + ``clusters[]`` with {cluster_id, cluster_kind, label, size, hit_indices}. Server groups the returned ``results[]`` Python-side after rrf_fuse (no LanceDB native combine, #1205 SIGSEGV guard). Cluster kinds: topic_cluster / theme_cluster / topic / ungrouped.

results.text: The concentration of AI-relevant fab capacity in Taiwan makes silicon supply a national-security concern for every G7.
Fab siting is being renegotiated as an industrial-policy tool, not just a capital-allocation one.
Compute governance is being determined by private-sector datacenter siting decisions rather than public regulation.

operator-consensus.description: Result-set operator Consensus (RFC-107 §6.5, ADR-108, Search v3 §S4b). Shipped shape: top-level ``operator: 'consensus'`` + ``consensus_pairs[]`` with the flat pair schema from server/schemas.py::SearchConsensusPairModel. Server reads enrichments/topic_consensus.json (precision ~0.91 on prod-v2) and filters pairs to topics in the current hit set. Cross-speaker CORROBORATION only — CONTRADICTS edges are v3+ (out of scope).

results.text: Regulation will materially lag the pace of frontier-model deployment for at least 24 months.
By the time meaningful AI rules land, the deployed system will have already trained the next generation.

consensus_pairs.insight_a_text: Regulation will materially lag the pace of frontier-model deployment for at least 24 months.
consensus_pairs.insight_b_text: By the time meaningful AI rules land, the deployed system will have already trained the next generation.

consensus_pairs.insight_a_text: The actual envelope of compute is set by the firms deciding where to put the next datacenter, not by any regulator.
consensus_pairs.insight_b_text: Compute governance is being determined by private-sector datacenter siting decisions rather than public regulation.

operator-compare.description: Result-set operator Compare (Search v3 §S8, RFC-107 §S8). Server wraps context_pack.build_briefing_pack (RFC-093) twice — one subject-scoped structured_corpus_search per side; response is {pack_a, pack_b, judge_summary?}. Judge summary is deterministic (no LLM) and muted when either pack reports grounded=false. Subject kinds map to search scope on the server: person → speaker=, topic → topic=, episode → episode_id=, feed → feed=.

temporal-intent.description: Query the router classifies as temporal_tracking (RFC-092 taxonomy). Header IntentChip renders 'Temporal tracking' (UXS-016 §Header §Intent row). Timeline operator would bucket these hits by publish_date.

params.q: how has thinking on AI compute governance evolved over the last year

response.query: how has thinking on AI compute governance evolved over the last year

results.text: Early in the year the frame was still: public infrastructure decisions will shape the envelope of AI compute.
By late spring the frame has flipped — private siting decisions are already setting the envelope.
